top_signals.title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
top_signals.summary: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

ACUA Ocean USV Collects 100 Hours of Continuous Multi-Domain Data
top_signals.summary: ACUA Ocean's Mk1 USV PIONEER has successfully completed a five-day remotely operated offshore demonstration, validating persistent, multi-domain maritime operations using an uncrewed surface vessel.On Monday 22 June 2026, PIONEER departed Turnchapel Wharf…
